author: bigbag
bpb_note: val_bpb computed via standard sentencepiece LUT byte counting (consistent with PR #1769 methodology). Train logs report sidecar-based BPB due to byte sidecar loading on training pods; val_loss (nats/token) is the ground truth.
techniques: SP8192 CaseOps tokenizer (lossless reversible case normalization)
LoRA-TTT improvements (alpha/rank scaling, warm-start A, WD 1.0, alpha 144)
11L x 512D x 8H/4KV, parallel residuals, depth recurrence
